title: 第 130 節
en: 2. I come into this world, I accept evili I resign myself to death * ;

' Yasna XLI, 5. According to Dastur Peshotan, these words were uttered by the first man, Gayd-Maretan, before his coming into the world, as a promise that he would never resort to suicide in order to free himself from pain (Andarze AtrepSt, p. 6, note i). Cf. § 104.
' Parsi translation of the Zend text.
VIII. AOGEMAlDfe. 373 3. Sh4t6-manau vahi5t6-urv4n6 (* With the mind in joy and the soul in bliss ^ *) :

In joy is he who realises the wish of his soul \ 4. May the accursed Gand Mainyd ' be smitten, destroyed, and broken, he who has no knowledge, who has evil knowledge, who is full of death, 5. Who destroys the body of the immortal soul !
6. May the immortal soul have its share in Paradise !
/• And may the pleasure and comfort that will dissipate the pain of the immortal soul come to us !

8. At the fourth dawn*, may the holy, strong Sraosha*, and Rashn R4st^ and the good Va6^ and Asht4//* the victorious, and Mihir • of the rolling country-side, and the Fravashis of the righteous ^ and the other virtuous spirits come to meet the soul of the blessed one, 9. And make the immortal soul pass over the Ajnvarf bridge " easily, happily, and fearlessly !
10. And may Vahman, the Amshaspand **, intercede for the soul of the blessed one, ^ Direct translation of the Zend text.
• A gloss to the Zend text ' For Zanft Mainyd, the same as Ahriman.

• Literally |t the third day-break (the day-break, dshbam, belonging to the preceding day, the following dawn belongs to the fourth day). On the state of the soul during the first three days-and-nights, or sadis, see Yt. XXII, and above, pp. 318-220.
" See above, p. 89, note i ; p. 196, note 3.
• See Yt. XII.
^ See Yt XV, and above, p. 52, note 3. The Good Va« or Vai is the Good destiny, that takes the soul to Paradise.
• See Yt. XVIII. • See Yt. X. " See Yt. XIII. " See above, p. 219, note i. ** See above, p. 220, note i.
1 1 . And introduce it to Auhrmazd and the Amshaspands !
12. Usehi^ta^/ VohA-Mand haia gitv6 zaranydkeret6 (* Up rises VohA-Man6 from his golden throne * ').
13. He will take the blessed one by the hand, 14. And make him rejoice as much as does the man who rejoices niost when on the pinnacle of nobility and glory.
15. And the Fravashis of the righteous will bring to the soul of the blessed those blessed aliments that are made at the time of Maidy6-zarm ^ :
16. jfiTz/arethanSm h6 beretSm zaremay6h6 raoghnahfi (* Let them bring unto him the butter of Maidhydi-zaremaya ^ ! ').
Aliments of waters, wine, sugar, and honey !

1 7. Yatha v4 erezatd paiti, yatha vi zaranyd paiti, yatha v4 k^i^ gaonanStm (' Of silver, or gold, or any other kind * ')• The Amshaspand Vahman will give to the soul of the blessed one clothes embroidered with gold and a golden throne ;
18. And the demon Ahriman will be powerless to inflict any harm or damage on the soul of the blessed one.
19. Pasia parairisttm da^va drva^ttd du^d^iunghd baodhem avatha fraterese^^ti, yatha malshi vehrkavaiti vehrk&flf ha^a frateresaiti ('The wicked evil- » Vd. XIX, 31. » See Yt. XXII, p. 318, note i.
» Yt.XXII, 18.
materials of which the throne is made.
Vllt. AOGEMAIDfe. 375 doing Da6vas tremble at his perfume after death, as doth a sheep on which a wolf is pouncing * ')».
As the sheep, on which the wolf is pouncing, tremble at the odour of the wolf, so these Dru^s tremble at the perfume of the blessed one.
20. For whosoever has been bom and whosoever shall be bom must act in such a way that, when the moment comes to leave this world, he may have Paradise as his portion and Gar6thmfin as his reward.
21. There is a passage in which Hdrmazd said to ZarathuJtra : * I created, O Spitama Zarathu^tra ! good renown and salvation of the soul ; '
zh: 2. 我來到這個世界，我接納邪惡；我甘願面對死亡*；
《雅斯那經》第四十一卷第五節。據達斯圖爾‧佩肖坦（Dastur Peshotan）所傳，這些言詞乃是第一人蓋德-馬雷坦（Gayd-Maretan）在降世之前所述說，作為一項承諾，謂其絕不會為了從痛苦中解脫而訴諸自殺（《安達茲‧艾特雷普聖典》(Andarze AtrepSt), 第六頁，注i）。參見第一○四節。
瑞典版本的祆教經典波斯語翻譯。
VIII. 阿歐蓋瑪爾德斐 373 3. 舍特-瑪瑙 瓦希特-烏爾瓦那（*心懷喜悅，靈魂享福*）：
喜樂中者乃實現其靈魂之願望者 \ 4. 願被詛咒的甘德‧邁因德（Gand Mainyd）遭受擊打、摧毀與破碎，彼無知識者、具有邪惡知識者、充滿死亡者， 5. 彼摧毀不朽靈魂之身體者！
願不朽之靈魂在天堂中獲得其應有之份！
願喜樂與安適降臨於我們，以消散不朽靈魂之苦痛！
8. 至第四個黎明時分*，願聖潔而強大的斯羅沙*（Sraosha）、拉許恩‧拉斯特（Rashn Rast）和善良的瓦胡（Vahu）與勝利者阿什塔特（Ashtad）*、滾滾鄉野之米赫爾（Mihir）以及正義者的護法靈（Fravashis）^與其他美德的靈魂前來迎接這位有福者的靈魂。9. 並使不朽的靈魂輕易、歡樂而無畏地跨越奇那瓦特橋（Aj́nvat bridge）*！
10. 願智慧之神瓦赫曼（Vahman），此位不死聖靈（Amshaspand），為蒙福者之靈魂代禱。^ 直譯自阿維斯陀文本。
• 對瑣羅亞斯德文本的注釋：「善神之敵」(Zanft Mainyd)，即同於阿赫里曼(Ahriman)。
• 字面上指第三天的破曉時分（破曉時分，dshbam，屬於前一日，隨後的黎明則屬於第四日）。關於靈魂在最初三晝夜或薩第斯（sadis）期間的狀態，參見《雅施特》（Yt.）第二十二篇，及前文第318-220頁。
見上文，第八十九頁註一；第一百九十六頁註三。
• 參見《耶斯那經》第十二章。
^ 見《雅什塔經》第十五卷，及上文第52頁注3。至善瓦（Vă或Vai）乃至善之命運，其引領靈魂前往天堂。
• 見《雅施特》第十八篇。• 見《雅施特》第十篇。「見《雅施特》第十三篇。「見上文，第219頁，註1。** 見上文，第220頁，註1。
1 1 . 並將其呈獻於阿胡拉‧馬茲達（Auhrmazd）及阿姆沙斯潘德人（Amshaspands）！
12. 烏色希塔（Usehi^ta^）／沃胡‧曼達（VohA-Mand）從他的金色寶座上升起（*沃胡‧曼達從他的金色寶座上升起*）。
13. 他將握著那蒙福者的手，14. 並使他喜樂，如同那在高貴與榮耀之巔而最為歡樂的人一樣。
15. 而義人的護靈（Fravashis）將把那些在邁德亞茲姆（Maidy6-zarm）時刻製作的有福食物帶給福樂者的靈魂：
16. 讓他們將邁德希‧札雷瑪亞（*Maidhydi-zaremaya*）的牛油獻予他（「願他們將邁德希‧札雷瑪亞的牛油獻予他」）。
水、酒、糖和蜜之滋養！
第 1 節第 7 段：如同銀器所往，如同金器所往，如同任何其他種類之物所往（'銀製或金製，或任何其他種類'）。善神瓦赫曼（Vahman）將賜予福祿之人的靈魂以金繡衣裳與金製之座。
18. 而魔鬼阿赫里曼（Ahriman）將無力對蒙福者的靈魂造成任何傷害或損害。

我注意到您提供的英文原文包含許多不規則的符號和文字組合，這些似乎是損壞或編碼錯誤的古代波斯語（阿維斯陀語）轉寫，而不是標準英文。 在這種情況下，我無法提供準確的繁體中文翻譯，因為： 1. 原文本身的字符序列不構成可識別的英文或清晰的學術轉寫 2. 缺乏足夠的語義上下文來判斷含義 3. 註釋參考（Vd. XIX, 31; Yt. XXII, p. 318）雖然清晰，但主文本無法解讀 **建議您：** - 確認原始掃描或OCR版本是否正確 - 提供清晰的《東方聖書》原版頁面影像 - 或提供完整、正確的梵文或波斯語轉寫版本 我很樂意在您提供可讀的原文後進行準確的翻譯。
» 耶柱往世書(Yajnavalkya Smriti)第22卷，第18節
寶座所由構成的材料。
極有可能，阿格瑪伊德費（*Aogemaidae*）375 做著諸天神（Devas）在其死後因其香氣而戰慄，猶如羊群於狼撲而驚懼*）」。
如同綿羊聞到撲向牠的狼的氣味而顫抖，這些德魯士（Dru^s）也同樣在聞到那位蒙福者的香氣時顫抖。
20. 凡是已經出生者，以及凡是將要出生者，都必須如此行動，俾使當離開此世之時，得以天堂（Paradise）為其份額，而以加羅斯姆芬（Garôthmân）為其獎賞。
21. 有一段記載中，阿胡拉‧馬茲達（Ahura Mazda）對瑣羅亞斯德說：「斯皮塔瑪‧瑣羅亞斯德啊！我創造了善名和靈魂的拯救；」
